title: I Was a Criminal
writer: Ivan Goff, Albrecht Joseph, Carl Zuckmayer
actors: Albert Bassermann, Mary Brian, Eric Blore
plot: In Prussia shoemaker Voigt needs a residence permit to get a job, but can only get a job if he already has a permit. He dons a captain's uniform to order a platoon of soldiers to Koepenick to take over the Town Hall to get his per...
